label: Status bar
summary: A sunken status strip whose direct children become cells. With JS, a hovered or focused link's real destination previews in a cell laid over the bar.
era: The browser status bar every 1998 homepage scribbled welcomes into, rebuilt in-page, where it can't spoof a link.

classes.name: rs-statusbar
classes.role: sunken strip; direct children become groove-divided cells

a11y: Static text, no live region, a status bar that chattered would be worse than one that blinked. If a ticker docks here, the ticker brings its own screen-reader manners.
